name: Virginia Corn Pones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add the shortening, buttermilk, and water to the dry mixture. Stir just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Shape the batter into oblong patties using about one-third of the batter for each patty.
4. Place the patties on lightly greased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
